prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: **主角形象描述提示词：**

A full-body portrait of Sherlock Holmes, an exceptionally handsome young man with striking and delicate features. He has distinctive curly black hair that catches the light beautifully, and piercing deep blue eyes that radiate intelligence and intensity. His facial structure is aristocratic with high cheekbones, a sharp jawline, and flawless clear skin that gives him an ethereal handsomeness. His expression is coldly elegant yet captivating, with a slight furrow of concentration between his perfectly shaped eyebrows.

He stands tall with a lean, graceful physique that exudes both intellectual sophistication and physical elegance. He wears a long, dark navy wool coat that flows dramatically around his frame, paired with a textured scarf wrapped loosely around his neck. Underneath, he sports a well-tailored dark suit with a crisp white shirt. His posture is confident and poised, with one hand slightly raised as if in the middle of making a deductive point.

His overall appearance embodies aristocratic refinement and magnetic charm, with every detail from his perfectly styled curls to his penetrating gaze suggesting extraordinary intelligence. The character radiates an aura of mystery and sophistication befitting a master detective in modern London.

Rendered in impressionist oil painting style with rich light and shadow variations, visible brushstrokes, and atmospheric depth. Full-body character design, centered standing pose, pure white background, no text, no symbols, no words.

handsome, attractive, delicate features, clear skin, aristocratic, elegant, sophisticated, mysterious, intelligent gaze, refined features, magnetic presence., very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: oil_painting
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
